title: Software Engineer
summary: Build and maintain full-stack web applications powering federal broadband programs, partner platforms, and internal tooling. Work closely with program managers and designers to deliver mission-focused solutions.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain Next.js and React applications
Integrate geospatial data sources and REST/GraphQL APIs
Write clean, tested, well-documented TypeScript code
Collaborate with program managers on federal project deliverables
Participate in code reviews and architectural planning
Support CI/CD pipelines and deployment to cloud environments
qualifications: 3+ years professional experience with TypeScript and React
Proficiency with Next.js App Router, server components, and SSG/SSR
Experience with REST APIs, databases, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure)
Strong understanding of web accessibility (WCAG 2.2) and responsive design
preferred: Experience with geospatial data, GIS systems, or FCC broadband programs
Familiarity with federal compliance frameworks (CMMC, FedRAMP)
Experience with Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, or design system development
compensation: Competitive salary, comprehensive health coverage, 401(k), flexible PTO
